name: Xi Jinping
title: General Secretary of the CPC & President of the PRC

scandals: Anti-corruption purges perceived as political tool

compatibilityOverrides.reason: Systemic great-power rivalry and trade conflicts

biography: Xi Jinping consolidated power as China's paramount leader, removing term limits and centralizing authority to a degree unseen since Mao. A strategic long-term planner, he pursues the 'China Dream' of national rejuvenation through economic dominance, military modernization, and reshaping the global order. His INTJ temperament drives meticulous five-year plans and a vision-first approach to geopolitics.
